title: Optimus
description:
A performance modpack with Optifine parity and some visual increments. 

26.1.2
body:
![Header: Optimus - A better vanilla experience](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/076ab67088fb36f2a58c21a78937c10a830afcb8.png)

🛈 New version numbering system starting with 26.1 Starting with 26.1, our version numbering system will change: ![New version numbering system, including the major release, the minecraft version and minor release, all in sequence.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8edd3ef9fc2b4591ecf9105da2c13acd42587463.png)
## ⁉️ Why Optimus? ### 🔥 Blazing fast performance Optimus is based on Adrenaline, onme of the greatest performance packs available. It greatlty improves minecraft's performance by default, and Optimus goes further to add a few mods not bundled by default ### 📦 Everything you need is already prepackaged Just install and go! Optimus provides a great lenght of QoL client-side tweaks, whilst keeping maximum performance. ### 🧡 Made with love. Optimus is a passion project, born long before the first public release. I've been building performance modpacks for 7 years (due to tremendous need lol), and Optimus itself was born 3 years ago. ### ✒️ Good design. Come on, don't you love the orange arrows?! ## ❔ Why not just use OptiFine? OptiFine's methods are and have always been extremaly invasive. This leads to a lot of issues with other mods, and also slows down updates. Also, it doesn't offer the same boost in performance today as it did on older versions, when it was at it's peak. ### Parity status for version 5.x:
Click to expand | **Feature** | **1.21.5** | |:---------------------------:|:------:| | Shaders | ✅ | | Dynamic Lights | ✅ | | Zoom | ✅ | | Better Grass | ✅ | | Connected Textures | ✅ | | Custom Item Textures | ⛔ | | Custom Entity Models | ✅ | | Capes | ✅ | | Animated Textures | ⛔ | | Particle Control | ✅ | | Detail Control | ✅ | | Animation Control | ✅ | | Miscellaneous Toggles | ✅ | | Custom Colors | ✅ | | Custom GUI | ✅ | | Custom Sky | ⛔ | | Emissive Blocks | ✅ | | Emissive Entities | ✅ | | Random Entities | ✅ | | Resource pack splash screen | ✅ |
## ➕ What are the QoL features added? - [Hunger-related improvements](https://modrinth.com/mod/EsAfCjCV), allowing you to preview hunger and saturation from foods and actually seing your current saturation; - Overall UI and UX improvements (animations, toggleable dark mode, numbered hotbar texture, etc) - [Better keybind management](https://modrinth.com/mod/xv94TkTM) - [Larger screenshots by pressing F9](https://modrinth.com/mod/3qsfQtE9) - [Access worlds from .minecraft everywhere](https://modrinth.com/mod/JL35Xbzz) - [Keeping chats across worlds and servers](https://modrinth.com/mod/KCNffinK) - Ability to [revert controversial game changes](https://modrinth.com/mod/nJxEs2tZ) - The basics: - [WAILA/HWYLA/WTHIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/6AQIaxuO) - [NEI/JEI/REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/nfn13YXA) - [Minimap](https://modrinth.com/mod/1bokaNcj) and [World map](https://modrinth.com/mod/NcUtCpym) **The list goes on; play to check everything out!** ## ℹ️ Still unsure? Check the wiki (coming soon!) ## 👤 Credits

Resource Packs

Optimus Core features [VanillaTweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/);

Mod credits are featured on each version's dependency list.
